% fig_lec10_curve_tangent.tex — Smooth curve C from p to q on M with tangent T^a
% Data: generated by scripts/sim_lec09_lec10.jl
%
% Curve in chart coords:  c(t) = (-2 + 4t,  -1 + 1.6·sin(2.5·t)),  t ∈ [0, 1].
% Lifted to M = { z = h(x,y) }.  Sample tangent T^a is drawn at t = 0.45;
% T_3D = ċ(t)·∂_u Φ + ḋ(t)·∂_v Φ at the lifted point.

\begin{center}
\begin{tikzpicture}
  \begin{axis}[
      width=10.0cm, height=6.2cm,
      view={-32}{34},
      xmin=-3, xmax=3, ymin=-3, ymax=3, zmin=-1.1, zmax=1.1,
      axis lines=none,
      xtick=\empty, ytick=\empty, ztick=\empty,
      clip=false,
  ]
    % Manifold (faded mesh, same as lec07/lec08)
    \addplot3[surf, opacity=0.30, shader=interp,
              colormap name=grsurface, mesh/rows=55, forget plot]
      table {data/lec07_surface.dat};

    % Curve C
    \addplot3[munsell, line width=1.3pt, no markers, forget plot]
      table {data/lec10_curve_M.dat};

    % Sample tangent T^a at t = 0.45
    \addplot3[
      quiver={u=\thisrowno{3}, v=\thisrowno{4}, w=\thisrowno{5}},
      -{Stealth[length=5pt, width=3.5pt]},
      banana!70!black, line width=1.0pt, no markers, forget plot,
    ] table[x index=0, y index=1, z index=2]
      {data/lec10_curve_tangent.dat};

    % Sample point (where T^a is anchored)
    \addplot3[only marks, mark=*, mark size=1.7pt, banana!90!black, forget plot]
      table {data/lec10_curve_sample_M.dat};

    % Endpoints p, q
    \addplot3[only marks, mark=*, mark size=1.9pt, banana!90!black, forget plot]
      table {data/lec10_curve_endpoints_M.dat};

    \node[font=\sf\small, text=spacecadet]
      at (axis cs:-2.4,-2.8,1.0) {$\M$};
    \node[font=\small, text=banana!60!black, anchor=north east]
      at (axis cs:-2.05,-1.05,-0.05) {$p$};
    \node[font=\small, text=banana!60!black, anchor=north west]
      at (axis cs:2.05,-0.04,0.30) {$q$};
    \node[font=\scriptsize, text=banana!50!black, anchor=south]
      at (axis cs:-0.20,0.50,1.05) {$T^a$};
    \node[font=\scriptsize, text=munsell, anchor=north east]
      at (axis cs:-1.05,-0.45,-0.20) {$C$};
    \node[font=\small, text=spacecadet, anchor=north west]
      at (axis cs:-2.7,2.7,1.0) {$g_{ab},\;\covd_a$};
  \end{axis}
\end{tikzpicture}
\end{center}
